calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Mar-19-2007 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: 9:07am
Judge Pro Tem Colleen Hoy, clerk-Beth Wilber, nothing on record:
Cause called for Small Claims Appeal. Two related cases are heard together: No. 028300 is heard with No. 028301.
William Dann, Esq. appears for Appellant, Nancy Jian, in both cases. Benjamin Yeung appears as certified interpreter of Chinese for Appellant Nancy Jian in both cases.
Respondent Xi Quan Zhong appears in Pro Per, with an informal interpreter, Cindy Wong, in case No. 028300.
Respondent Johna Zhong appears in Pro Per in case No. 028301.
Mr. Dann presents case for Nancy Jian. Ms. Jian, previously sworn, testifies.
Respondents Xi Quan Zhong and Johna Zhong present their respective cases in the narrative. Mr. Zhong is assisted by Ms. Cindy Wong.
EXHA1 Diagram of accident site
EXHA2 Xerox pages of accident site and Appellant's car, with 2 color photos of car
EXHA3 Estimates for repairs to Appellant's car
9:20am
Matter is submitted. Evidence is admitted and retained. Appellant's evidence will be returned to Mr. Dann. No exhibits were lodged by the respondents
